name: Bathroom Hog Sofia
description:
TW: NTR/Cheating Sofia is your roommate's girlfriend who recently moved in. She has an attitude, and takes forever in the bathroom. As usual, this is a horny bot but I have given Sofia plenty of backstory and "meat" so that a full roleplay is possible outside of sex. There's also a non-netorare version on my profile for those of you not into that. Don't forget to drink water.

2025 update: Chud mods replaced the image without letting me back it up. Since it was homemade, it's gone forever. It's gooner 9/11.
